items.prompt: A relative symlink’s target is resolved from…
items.explain: Relative targets are relative to the link’s location, not your cwd when you typed ln.

items.prompt: Moving an entire project tree to a new prefix usually keeps…
choices: Relative links whose relative path between link and target is unchanged
items.explain: Relative links survive whole-tree moves; absolute links often still point at the old prefix.

items.prompt: Moving only a relative symlink to a different directory often breaks it.
items.explain: The stored relative path no longer reaches the target from the new location.
readlink prints the link text (relative or absolute).
